_meta.purpose: Per-repo main-branch protection for the Delivery OS ecosystem. Source of truth for apply-branch-protection.sh. INCREMENTAL: required_status_checks lists EVERY check with active=true|false + activates_at; only active=true checks are sent now (a not-yet-built required check would block ALL PRs).
_meta.do_not_run_note: This config is applied by the FOUNDER via apply-branch-protection.sh (founder-gated, outward-facing). The worker agent does NOT apply it.
_meta.check_name_rule: Each check 'name' MUST equal the GitHub status-check CONTEXT exactly — that is the job's display name (the job's `name:` if set, else the job id). A mismatch makes protection silently pass (DRB Risk: required-check names that don't match jobs).

deferred_sprints.verify-coverage: 1.x (the D9 machine_probe on neutral CI — name reserved; job lands with the first slice that ships a class probe)
deferred_sprints.config-gate: 1.2 (uniform I-Config oracle / config-doctor across the ecosystem)

repos.note: DOS dogfoods templates and has NO .github/workflows today, so its required-status-check set is EMPTY now. The floor here is CODEOWNERS review + linear history + no direct push + no admin bypass + required PR. Checks below activate as DOS grows its own CI.

ADM has ci.yml (engine-ownership drift gate + build-and-migrate) and config-gate.yml. The two ci.yml jobs are ACTIVE required checks now. config-gate.yml EXISTS but is held to 1.2 (the uniform I-Config oracle) to avoid blocking PRs on un-provisioned Vercel read secrets before the oracle is canonical.

required_checks.name: engine-ownership
required_checks.note: the drift gate; skips loudly until DELIVERY_OS_REPO/TOKEN secrets are provisioned, then hard-fails on drift — safe to require now. Pin its checkout ref to a DOS tag (drift-gate-pin.md).

required_checks.name: build-and-migrate
required_checks.note: build/tsc + unit + migrate-applies-clean + rollback + the vendored v6 gates — exists now.

required_checks.name: validate prod config (fail-closed)
required_checks.note: config-gate.yml job display-name. Exists, but promotion to REQUIRED waits for 1.2 + provisioned VERCEL_* read secrets (else risks blocking all PRs).

repos.note: PLOS ci.yml exposes an aggregator job `verify` (green iff ci-db-test + ci-static[incl. the OS drift-lint step] + ci-build all pass) already documented as the required check (DO NOT RENAME). Requiring `verify` transitively binds the drift gate. PLOS has no standalone engine-ownership job.

required_checks.name: verify
required_checks.note: aggregator: ci-db-test + ci-static (contains the OS-drift drift-lint) + ci-build. The existing documented required check.

required_checks.name: config-gate
required_checks.note: PLOS runs its config gate inside `vercel build` today; the uniform required check lands at 1.2.

repos.note: JAR is undeployed and has NO .github/workflows. Required-status-check set is EMPTY now; the floor is CODEOWNERS + linear + no direct push + no admin bypass + required PR. Heavy LLM-spend gates are deferred to P5.3.

WEB GitHub slug is rumah-housing-website (local dir is rumah-website). ci.yml exposes job `verify` (typecheck/lint/build + strict SEO). Per DRB: website = ci + light verify only. `verify` is ACTIVE now.

required_checks.name: verify
required_checks.note: typecheck + lint + build + strict SEO checks — exists now.
